description: User pauses to examine the 'AI Interview' task card in the 'Short tasks & surveys' section.
User scrolls down the Explore page to browse through the 'Sessions to schedule' list, viewing tasks like 'Diary Study' and 'Video Call'.
User scrolls back up to the top of the Explore page.
User scrolls horizontally through the 'Short tasks & surveys' carousel to view more task options, including a $25 AI Interview and a $1 Survey.
